overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Hogwarts Legacy showing a first-person boat journey approaching and entering a gothic wooden boathouse at night. The camera moves steadily through the water-filled interior, revealing ornate architecture, warm lighting, and stained glass before tilting upward to admire the vaulted ceiling.

events.description: entering the covered boathouse structure from the open water, passing under the ornate wooden archway

agents.ego_description: piloting a small boat through calm water toward the illuminated boathouse entrance

entered.detail: ornate wooden gothic structure with pointed arches and intricate carvings
dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky
calm dark water reflecting the building lights
small red wooden boats moored along the sides
warm orange glowing lights mounted on the wooden walls
large circular stained glass window at the far end of the structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an exterior night view of an elaborate gothic boathouse, with mountains visible in the background under a dark blue sky. The camera moves steadily forward through the water, approaching the illuminated entrance. Warm light from wall sconces becomes visible as the structure fills the frame, and the scene transitions from open air to the covered interior around the 10-second mark.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the water-filled interior passage of the boathouse, passing stationary boats on either side

segments.scene_description: Moving through the interior of the boathouse, the camera glides through calm water between moored wooden boats. The gothic architecture surrounds the viewer with ornate wooden beams and warm wall sconces, while the large stained glass window at the far end grows progressively larger and more detailed as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral-style interior with vaulted ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward from forward-facing to ceiling-facing, revealing the vaulted wooden roof structure and upper windows

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera upward to admire the ornate ceiling architecture and stained glass window above

entered.detail: intricate wooden vaulted ceiling with exposed beams and gothic tracery
tall pointed archways framing the side windows

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the magnificent vaulted wooden ceiling of the boathouse. The perspective shifts from the water level to the ornate roof beams and the large stained glass window, showcasing the gothic architectural details and warm lighting from the wall sconces illuminating the wooden structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide from a dark, open-air waterfront into the warm, ornate interior of a gothic boathouse. It begins under a dark blue night sky with distant mountains, moving steadily across the water toward an illuminated entrance. As the camera passes beneath the structure, the open air gives way to a sheltered hall where the viewer glides between moored wooden boats beneath glowing wall sconces. The scene then advances toward a large, detailed stained glass window at the far end of the hall, with the gothic wooden beams framing the path. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the water level to reveal the magnificent vaulted ceiling and the intricate architectural details of the roof.
